# Accuracy

**Summary**: The degree to which a measurement or prediction is close to the true value.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] measured accuracy using Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE).

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] Used to quantify the success of data improvement algorithms.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] Calculated as MAPE.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The proposed approach aims for an accuracy of 95%. ([[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022, p. 23]])
